_comment: Machine-local Claude Code settings. Copy to settings.local.json (gitignored) and adjust. This minimal example replaces the original 140-row personal allowlist. Add only the permissions you actually want to pre-approve.

permissions._defaultMode_note: The source machine used 'bypassPermissions' (no prompts). That is convenient but unsafe on a shared/unfamiliar box — start with 'acceptEdits' or 'default' and widen deliberately.

_hooks_note: Per-machine hook wiring (the CN write-guard, usage-log, etc.) goes here, with absolute paths. See claude-global/settings.json for the shared OS-neutral hook wiring the installer parameterizes.
